title: Bridge Essay: Neural Dynamics During the Generation and Evaluation of Creative and Non-Creativ

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Neural, Dynamics, During, the, Generation.

**Neural Dynamics During the Generation and Evaluation of Creative and Non-Creative Ideas.** — bioRxiv. PMID: 38659810. DOI: 10.1101/2024.04.15.589621. What are the neural dynamics that drive creative thinking? Recent studies have provided much insight into the neural mechanisms of creative thought. Specifically, the interaction between the executive control, default mode, and salience brain networks has been shown to be an important marker of individual differences in creative ability.
